message:
test(fwc): add 62 invoke/simulate/batch/explain tests for bead 1g7z0.10

Covers: offline invoke/simulate paths, denied preflight, connector/operation
resolution errors, empty/null input handling, batch success/partial/all-fail,
explain command dispatch, --file flag, coercion (int/bool/null/array),
invoke_payload_preview shapes, invoke_leaf_field_count, coerce_invoke_value
unit tests, host round-trip auth.

FWC total: 10,194+ tests passing (1 pre-existing schema_nav failure).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
